programme.title: History'S Most Shocking
programme.desc: (M) Tony analyzes shocking moments: a man crashing his plane for fame, giant snakes falling from a roof, cyclists nearly crushed, and the 1971 Soviet jet crash at the Paris Air Show.

programme.title: How The World Made America
programme.desc: (M) Examines the greatest human migrations of all time, and the impacts they have had - culturally, sociologically, and politically - on the United States.

programme.title: D-Day: The Untold Stories
programme.desc: (M) To commemorate the 75th anniversary of D-Day, this special presents the key events of the Allied invasion of Nazi-held Europe; the subsequent battles captured control of Normandy.

programme.title: Hiroshima: 75 Years Later
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
